description: Anti-false-positive baseline. Updated by validate_progress.py --accept-baseline ONLY after confirming REAL progress.
rules: 0 syscalls            = FALSE POSITIVE (ELF not loaded into ps2_ram)
syscall 0x00 dominates (>95%)  = spin loop in thread-yield wait
syscall 0x83 dominates (>95%)  = DMA merge spin loop (FIXED in bios_stub)
UNHANDLED count UP    = REGRESSION in recompiler
TODO count UP         = REGRESSION in recompiler

known_blockers.syscall_0x83: FIXED — alternating DMA pointer return in bios_stub.cpp (commit 0070940)
known_blockers.syscall_0x00: ACTIVE — game spin-waits on thread-yield (r[3]=0). Needs: detect loop + simulate wakeup or implement real thread reschedule stub in bios_stub.cpp. The game calls syscall with r[3]=0 (~2.4B times) waiting for IOP/thread event. Real BIOS would suspend thread and reschedule. Fix: add counter in default/0x00 case, after N calls set regs->r[2]=1 to simulate wakeup.

note: After 0x83 fix: 0x00 dominates. syscall_unique=1 means only one real code reached — game stuck before BIOS init completes. Progress: UNHANDLED went from 2410 to 0.
